case_title: JUSTIN CAIN VS. NA AE KIM

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED NOV-05-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KIM, NA AE DBA TOP DOG BOUTIQUE AND GROOMING

CASE DISMISSED WITHOUTPREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT MS. NA AE KIM BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF JAN-05-2015 AT 1:30 PM. DEFENDANT MS. NA AE KIM APPEARS IN PROPRIA PERSONA. THERE IS NO APPEARANCE BY OR FOR PLAINTIFF MR. JUSTIN CAIN THIS DAY. JUDGE: HON. DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK MARJORIE L. MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (DEPT. 506).

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAIN, JUSTIN ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THE DEFENDANT APPEARS; THERE IS NO APPEARANCE BY OR FOR PLAINTIFF. JUDGE: HON. DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK MARJORIE L. MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (DEPT. 506).
RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL MAILED TO PLAINTIFF RETURNED=RETURN TO SENDER, ATTEMPTED, NOT KNOWN, UNABLE TO FORWARD
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY CAIN, JUSTIN AS TO DEFENDANT KIM, NA AE DBA TOP DOG BOUTIQUE AND GROOMING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-05-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
RETURNED MAIL: PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM MAILED CERTIFIED TO DEFENDANT RETURNED.
